title: inspect (bundle reader)
manager: `inspect` — read a compiled FSL bundle and report what is inside it: metadata, version, machines, artifacts. This is the tool for understanding a distributed or serialized machine you didn't author, the compiled-form counterpart to `list` — what you reach for when someone hands you a bundle and asks "what even is this."
cs: `inspect` verb reads compiled bundles; reports metadata/version/contents; the compiled-form counterpart to `list` (W6.105).
